input_pages.robots_notes: ChEMBL API permits programmatic retrieval of open bioactivity data without strict rate limiting.
input_pages.selection_reason: Primary programmatic source for high-confidence wild-type and mutant EGFR bioactivity data (IC50 records).
input_pages.expected_content: JSON response containing structured bioactivity measurements and associated compound details.

input_pages.robots_notes: PubChem PUG REST API allows automated querying; request frequency must not exceed 5 requests per second.
input_pages.selection_reason: Supplementary source providing a high volume of EGFR screening assay records to extend coverage.
input_pages.expected_content: JSON payload containing assay descriptions, CID, and outcome/activity values for EGFR targets.

input_pages.robots_notes: Programmatic REST API queries are permitted; respect server load by keeping request frequency reasonable.
input_pages.selection_reason: Valuable repository for thermodynamic values (Ki, Kd) of EGFR inhibitors to complement IC50 measurements.
input_pages.expected_content: JSON payload containing ligand structures, affinity values (Ki, Kd, IC50), and target designations for UniProt entry P00533.

input_pages.robots_notes: Zenodo is an open-access repository that supports direct downloading of files via unique record URLs.
input_pages.selection_reason: Large-scale external validation benchmark containing annotated records across 11 EGFR mutations.
input_pages.expected_content: Comma-separated values (CSV) table with annotated compound records, mutations, and activities.
